pm_review.reason: Two false positive safety overrides: (1) regex_markdown_injection matched a shields.io badge logo=data:image/svg URL in README — not injection. (2) regex_js_buffer_from matched Buffer.from(config).toString(base64) in release.sh encoding a Cursor IDE install link — not obfuscation. 4,449 real stars, MIT licensed, actively maintained by cameroncooke, 955 commits, 0 mismatches, 0 undocumented capabilities. Clear pass.
